title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a TRACK LAYOUT
gherkin:
When the user creates a "TRACK LAYOUT" "GP Circuit" with the following data
  | key  | value      |
  | name | GP Circuit |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key                   | value      |
  | name                  | GP Circuit |
  | year_from             |            |
  | year_to               |            |
  | length                |            |
  | length_unit           |            |
  | direction             |            |
  | elevation_change      |            |
  | elevation_change_unit |            |
  | surface               |            |
